name: Franklin Golf Lab
about: Franklin Golf Lab is a modern, membership-based indoor golf facility focused on player improvement through cutting-edge technology and expert coaching. The venue features 5 private TrackMan simulator bays that provide tour-level data analysis for every shot, complemented by PuttView putting systems for precise short-game training. It serves golfers in Franklin, Brentwood, and Berry Farms with a data-driven approach to improvement, combining 24/7 access with personalized coaching programs. The facility emphasizes continuous development through its analytics platform and structured membership tiers designed for various skill levels, from casual players to competitive juniors.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level TrackMan technology provides unmatched ball and club data accuracy
24/7 access allows flexible practice schedules around busy lifestyles
PGA coaching with TrackMan integration for personalized swing analysis
PuttView technology offers detailed putting feedback and interactive challenges
Performance analytics track progress over time for measurable improvement
Junior development programs with structured skill assessments and coaching

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; venue appears to allow outside consumption (BYOB)
BYOB likely permitted but no formal bar service; no alcohol mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: 5 private bays with professional-grade launch monitor accuracy

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly mention club rentals, so bringing your own clubs is recommended. Some options for club fitting services are available through their PGA coaching program.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB (bring your own beverages) appears to be allowed based on the community club atmosphere, though no formal kitchen or bar service is mentioned. No food service is indicated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 5 private bays and 24/7 access, playing time is flexible. TrackMan sessions allow 2-3 hour blocks depending on membership tier, enough time for a full 18 holes on simulated courses.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Franklin Golf Lab offers a Junior Elite Lab program specifically for ages 7-17, with supervised family access, bi-weekly coaching, and quarterly skill assessments, making it suitable for young golfers.
